# 'gs stack submit --fill' passes correct per-branch env vars
# on re-submit (update path) with GS_MESSAGE_UPDATE=true.

as 'Test <test@example.com>'
at '2024-04-05T16:40:32Z'

# setup
cd repo
git init
git commit --allow-empty -m 'Initial commit'

# set up a fake GitHub remote
shamhub init
shamhub new origin alice/example.git
shamhub register alice
git push origin main

env SHAMHUB_USERNAME=alice
gs auth login

# create a stack: main -> feature1 -> feature2
git add feature1.txt
gs bc -m 'Add feature 1' feature1
git add feature2.txt
gs bc -m 'Add feature 2' feature2

# initial submit with --fill
gs ss --fill
stderr 'Created #1'
stderr 'Created #2'

# configure a generator that echoes update status and env vars
git config spice.messageGenerator 'printf "update=$GS_MESSAGE_UPDATE branch=$GS_BRANCH base=$GS_BASE\n\nupdated body for $GS_BRANCH"'

# make changes on each branch and re-submit
gs bco feature1
cp $WORK/extra/feature1-update.txt feature1.txt
git add feature1.txt
git commit -m 'update feature 1'
gs sr

gs bco feature2
cp $WORK/extra/feature2-update.txt feature2.txt
git add feature2.txt
git commit -m 'update feature 2'

gs bco feature1
gs ss --fill
stderr 'Updated #1'
stderr 'Updated #2'

shamhub dump changes
cmpenvJSON stdout $WORK/golden/changes.json

-- repo/feature1.txt --
Contents of feature 1
-- repo/feature2.txt --
Contents of feature 2

-- extra/feature1-update.txt --
Updated feature 1
-- extra/feature2-update.txt --
Updated feature 2

-- golden/changes.json --
[
  {
    "number": 1,
    "state": "open",
    "title": "update=true branch=feature1 base=main",
    "body": "updated body for feature1",
    "html_url": "$SHAMHUB_URL/alice/example/change/1",
    "head": {
      "repository": {
        "owner": "alice",
        "name": "example"
      },
      "ref": "feature1",
      "sha": "a85049ea92598807902e5508be230ab849bccae0"
    },
    "base": {
      "repository": {
        "owner": "alice",
        "name": "example"
      },
      "ref": "main",
      "sha": "ece8ed7bb81d74cb6787309fa41b7deb2e0558a3"
    }
  },
  {
    "number": 2,
    "state": "open",
    "title": "update=true branch=feature2 base=feature1",
    "body": "updated body for feature2",
    "html_url": "$SHAMHUB_URL/alice/example/change/2",
    "head": {
      "repository": {
        "owner": "alice",
        "name": "example"
      },
      "ref": "feature2",
      "sha": "43042235a50b58fc1772e294399eda0f94941e09"
    },
    "base": {
      "repository": {
        "owner": "alice",
        "name": "example"
      },
      "ref": "feature1",
      "sha": "a85049ea92598807902e5508be230ab849bccae0"
    }
  }
]
